edits.rationale: The clause content has changed in v2, requiring an update to the citation in the Work Instruction.
edits.new_text: per AIQS 1.2.4 — Documentation of normative references.

edits.rationale: The definition of 'FAI' and 'LOTO' has been updated in v2 to clarify their meanings in the context of quality assurance.
edits.new_text: specifically AIQS 1.3.3 — FAI and LOTO definitions 'FAI' and 'LOTO' shall be defined in the context of quality assurance as follows: 'FAI' refers to First Article Inspection, a process that verifies that the first production unit meets all specified requirements before full-scale manufacturing begins.

edits.rationale: The clause content has changed in v2 to focus on asset identification verification rather than just reviewing previous audit reports and NCRs.
edits.old_text: Review previous audit reports and Nonconformance Reports (NCRs) to identify areas of concern per AIQS 2.1.4.
edits.new_text: Periodic verification of asset identification shall be conducted to ensure that all equipment is accurately tagged and documented per AIQS 2.1.4.

edits.rationale: The clause number has changed in v2, and the definition of ORR is now included in the updated clause.
edits.old_text: Verify that all personnel involved in the audit preparation are trained and familiar with the AIQS standards, particularly AIQS 1.3.4.
edits.new_text: Verify that all personnel involved in the audit preparation are trained and familiar with the AIQS standards, particularly AIQS 1.3.5.

edits.rationale: The clause content has changed in v2 to focus on asset identification verification rather than operational compliance.
edits.new_text: as outlined in AIQS 2.1.4 — Asset identification verification.

edits.rationale: The definition of 'FAI' and 'LOTO' has been updated in v2, necessitating a change in the citation context.
edits.new_text: per AIQS 1.3.3 — FAI and LOTO definitions.

The clause content has changed in v2, requiring an update to the citation and context.
